sections.sectionTitle: Solomon' Nuai-ah Pan'munte leh A semte

verses.text: Kumpi Solomon pen Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi hi a
ama nuai-ah pan'munte leh a semte hih bang ahi hi: Siampi nasep: Zadok' tapa Azariah ahi hi
Lai-at nasep: Shisha' tapa Elihoref leh Ahijah ahi uh hi. Thu ciamteh nasep: Ahilud' tapa Jehoshafat ahi hi
Galkapte a uk nasep: Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah ahi hi. Siampite nasep: Zadok leh Abiathar ahi uh hi
Uliante tungah a uk nasep: Nathan' tapa Azariah ahi hi. Kumpi thu lamlak nasep: Nathan' tapa Zabud ahi hi
Kumpi inn uk nasep: Ahishar ahi hi. Aana tawh nasemte a uk nasep: Abda' tapa Adoniram ahi hi

Solomon in Israel khempeuh tungah ulian sawmlenih nei-in tuate in kumpipa leh a innkuan-a' dingin annek tuidawn vaihawmsak uh hi. Mi khat in kum khatin kha khat sung annek tuidawn vaihawmsak ciat uh hi
Tua a vaihawm uliante: Benhur: Efraim mualtung gamsungah
Bendeker: Makaz khua, Shaalbim, Bethshemesh khua, leh Elonbethhanan khuasungah
Benhesed: Arubboth khuasungah (Soko leh Hefer gam khempeuh ama-a' hi
Benabinadab: Nafathdor gamsung khempeuhah (amah in Solomon' tanu Tafath zi-in nei hi
Ahilud' tapa Baana: Taanak khua, Megiddo khua, leh Jezreel khua nuai Zarethan khua panga om Bethshean gam khempeuh, leh Bethshean khua panin Jokmeam khua leh Abelmeholah dongah
Bengeber: Ramothgilead gamsungah (amah in Gilead sunga om Manasseh' tapa Jair' khuaneute leh Bashan sungah a om Argob gamsung, kulhpite leh sumngo zawlte a nei khuapi lian sawmguk nei hi
Iddo' tapa Ahinadab: Mahanaim khuasungah
Ahimaaz: Naftali gamsungah (amah in Solomon' tanu Basemath zi-in la hi
Hushai' tapa Baana: Asher gam leh Bealoth khuasungah
Paruah' tapa Jehoshafat: Issakhar gamsungah
Ela' tapa Shimei: Benjamin gamsungah
Uri' tapa Gebal: Amor mite' kumpi Sihon leh Bashan kumpi Og gam ahi Gilead gamsungah ahi hi. Tua ciangin hih sawmlenihte banah Judah gamsung khempeuh a uk uliankhat omlai hi.
Judah mi leh Israel mi tuipi gei-a sehnel bangin tam uh a, amaute in anne tuidawnin lungdam uh hi
Solomon in Eufratis panin Filistia gam leh Egypt gamgi ciangdong kumpi gam khempeuh uk hi. Amaute in siah hong puak uh a, a nuntak sung tawntung uh Solomon' na sem uh hi
Solomon-a' ding ni khatin annek tuidawn, annel lawh sawmthum, leh an lawh sawmguk
bawngtal a thau sawm, leh lonona-a kivak bawng sawmnih; tuu za khat; sakhitalte, leh syria sakhite, sanangte, leh a thau vasate a kisimlo hi lai hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Eufratis nitumna lam gamsung khempeuh Tifsah panin Gaza ciangdong, Eufratis nitumna lampang kumpi khempeuh uk a, ama kiim mun khempeuhah galdaihna om hi
Solomon' hun sung khempeuh Judah leh Israel lungmuang takin omin, Dan panin Beersheba ciangdong nangawn mi khempeuh a leenggui leh a theikung nuai uhah lungnuamin om uh hi
Solomon in a leengte-a' dingin buk a nei ciat sakol tul sawmli leh sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm leh tul nih zong nei hi
Tua uliante in Kumpi Solomon leh Kumpi Solomon' sabuai-ah a hong pai mite khempeuh-a' dingin amau ciat sik kha sunga dingin annek tuidawn vaihawm uh a, amaute in bangmah kisamsaklo uh hi
Amau' nasep ciat tawh kizui-in a kisapna munah sakolte leh sakol zaptelte-a' dingin mangbuhham leh buhtu zong paipih uh hi
Pasian in Solomon' tungah tehzawh lohin a thuk mahmah pilna leh theihna, leh genzawhloh lungsim zaina pia a
Solomon' pilna in nisuahna lam mi khempeuh leh Egypt pilna khempeuh khumlet hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh midang khempeuh sangin amah pilzaw a, Ezrah mi Ethan, leh Mahol' tapa Heman, Kalkol, leh Darda sangin pilzaw lai a, a kiima minam khempeuh lakah ama minthan'na kizel hi
Amah in paunak tul thum zong genkhia a, ama laphuah dawng tul leh dawng nga ahi hi
Amah in Lebanon-a om taamtak-a kipan phungmai-a po puknahte dongin singkung thu a gen hi. Amah in khe li nei ganhingte, vasate, a bokvak ganhingte, leh ngasate' thu a gen hi
Mi khempeuh leh leitung kumpi khempeuh sung panin Solomon' pilna thu a ngai dingin ama pilna thu a zasate hong pai uh hi.
